sections.paragraph:
, Arab. طَلَّ Eth. አጥለለ፡ to moisten gently, as the earth with dew or showers.

Hence טַל dew.

II.

טלל

i.q. צָלַל No.III. Arab. ظَلَّ II. to overshadow, hence to cover over.

Piel טִלֵּל to cover, especially with beams or planks (elsewhere קָרָה), Neh 3:15. Compare Gen 19:8, צֵל קֹורָתִי.

Pilpel טִלְטֵל is from טוּל, which see.
